aiInsight: Our top pick is Liverpool Over 4.5 Shots on Target against Burnley; Liverpool averages a league-best 6.8 SOT at home, with Burnley conceding 5.9 SOT on the road. Avoid the Chelsea vs. Everton match; Chelsea's SOT consistency is volatile (3.2 SOT last three games), and Everton's compact defense can limit chances significantly. Confidence in today's overall card is moderate, given several tight fixtures with less predictable SOT outcomes.
